# Pull Request Template

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does. Link to related issues or Discussions if applicable. -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option(s) with an [x] -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / enhancement (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation improvement or update
- [ ] Framework / governance / process improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related Issues / Discussions
<!-- Link to any related GitHub Issues or Discussions (e.g., #123, Framework Ideas category) -->

## Bitcoin Values Alignment
<!-- Briefly explain how this change strengthens or aligns with Bitcoin sovereignty, sound money, voluntary cooperation, privacy, verifiable systems, or open truth-seeking. If not applicable, state why. -->

## Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are completed before requesting review -->
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the contribution process (Discussion → Proposal → PR).
- [ ] Changes are focused and appropriately scoped.
- [ ] Documentation and comments are clear, professional, and neat.
- [ ] Content is factually and legally accurate where applicable.
- [ ] This change maintains or improves the quality of official publications.
- [ ] I have tested / verified the changes locally where relevant.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests if applicable.
- [ ] My commit messages follow conventional guidelines (or I will squash on merge).

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or considerations for reviewers. -->

## Reviewers
<!-- @mention specific maintainers or CODEOWNERS if you have preferences (optional) -->
